steps.title: Identify what fictitious hoaxes actually are
steps.content: The passage describes these as fictitious entries perpetrated as hoaxes — they are invented, made-up things. When finally detected, they'd be recognized for what they fundamentally are.

steps.title: Match to the word naming what these entries were
steps.content:
Substitute each choice: entries persisted until finally recognized as ______ and deleted.

A) fabrications — "fabrications" means invented, made-up falsehoods. The entries are described as "fictitious" and "hoaxes" — fabrications is the precise label for something invented and false. Keep.

B) analyses — "analyses" means detailed examinations or studies. A fictitious entry about a fake town is not an analysis of anything. Eliminate.

C) revelations — "revelations" means surprising disclosures of truth. These entries were lies, not truths being revealed. Opposite meaning. Eliminate.

D) enhancements — "enhancements" means improvements. A hoax that adds false information to Wikipedia is not improving it. Eliminate.

A is correct.
